requirement_topic.en: Mauritania Market Access — DNPQ Standards, ARE / SOMELEC Gates, and Early EV Market Reality
requirement_topic.zh: 毛里塔尼亚市场准入——DNPQ标准、ARE / SOMELEC门槛及早期EV市场现实
requirement_topic.zht: 茅利塔尼亞市場准入——DNPQ標準、ARE / SOMELEC門檻及早期EV市場現實

summary.en: Mauritania's national standardization function is identified as DNPQ (Direction de la Normalisation et de la Promotion de la Qualité), while ARE regulates the electricity sector and SOMELEC is the national electricity utility. As of 2026-06-14, no single public mandatory Mauritania whole-unit EVSE product certificate or EV-charger import conformity route was confirmed from official public sources. Exporters should therefore verify current DNPQ standards adoption, customs classification, import inspection, electrical safety expectations, ARE licensing or public-service obligations, and SOMELEC connection requirements before shipment. The EV market appears essentially nascent; grid deficits, low electrification in rural areas, long desert routes, high ambient temperatures, dust, and maintenance logistics make public charging impractical unless a funded fleet, mining, port, urban, or donor-backed project provides clear demand and infrastructure support.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚国家标准化职能识别为DNPQ（标准化与质量促进局），ARE监管电力行业，SOMELEC为国家电力公司。截至2026年6月14日，尚未从官方公开来源确认毛里塔尼亚统一强制EVSE整机产品证书或电动汽车充电桩进口合格评定路径。因此，出口商应在出货前核实现行DNPQ标准采纳、海关归类、进口检验、电气安全预期、ARE许可或公共服务义务，以及SOMELEC接入要求。电动汽车市场显然仍处于萌芽状态；电网缺口、农村地区低电气化、漫长沙漠路线、高环境温度、粉尘和维护物流，使公共充电在没有资金明确的车队、矿业、港口、城市或捐助方支持项目提供需求和基础设施支持时不具现实可行性。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞國家標準化職能識別為DNPQ（標準化與質量促進局），ARE監管電力行業，SOMELEC為國家電力公司。截至2026年6月14日，尚未從官方公開來源確認茅利塔尼亞統一強制EVSE整機產品證書或電動汽車充電樁進口合格評定路徑。因此，出口商應在出貨前核驗現行DNPQ標準採納、海關歸類、進口檢驗、電氣安全預期、ARE許可或公共服務義務，以及SOMELEC接入要求。電動汽車市場顯然仍處於萌芽狀態；電網缺口、農村地區低電氣化、漫長沙漠路線、高環境溫度、粉塵和維護物流，使公共充電在沒有資金明確的車隊、礦業、港口、城市或捐助方支持項目提供需求和基礎設施支持時不具現實可行性。

standards_or_laws: DNPQ — Direction de la Normalisation et de la Promotion de la Qualité (national standardization and quality function; verify current legal scope)
ARE — Autorité de Régulation (electricity-sector regulator; verify EVSE licensing and public charging scope)
SOMELEC utility connection and metering requirements
IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000 standards where adopted by DNPQ, tender, lender, insurer, or project owner
Mauritania customs and import inspection requirements for electrical equipment (verify HS code and route)

summary.en: China-market charger documentation normally includes GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connector conformity, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication evidence, China domestic EMC / safety testing, labels in Chinese, and local grid-operator acceptance records. These documents support a China domestic installation but do not determine Mauritania import status, DNPQ conformity, ARE public-service approval, SOMELEC connection acceptance, IEC connector interoperability, or project bankability.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩文件通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口符合性、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信证据、中国国内EMC / 安全测试、中文标签以及本地电网运营商验收记录。这些文件支持中国国内安装，但不能决定毛里塔尼亚进口状态、DNPQ合格性、ARE公共服务批准、SOMELEC接入接受、IEC接口互操作或项目融资可接受性。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁文件通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口符合性、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊證據、中國國內EMC / 安全測試、中文標籤以及本地電網運營商驗收記錄。這些文件支持中國國內安裝，但不能決定茅利塔尼亞進口狀態、DNPQ合格性、ARE公共服務批准、SOMELEC接入接受、IEC接口互操作或項目融資可接受性。

standards_or_laws: China domestic electrical product and grid-operator acceptance requirements

gap.en: The largest gap is market and project feasibility rather than a published EVSE certificate. Exporters should not ship speculative public chargers without confirming demand, grid capacity, payment model, spare parts, field-service coverage, customs route, French / Arabic documentation, IEC-based evidence requirements, and whether the project owner expects Type 2 / CCS2 rather than GB/T. Where a donor, mining company, port operator, fleet owner, or city project is involved, its tender and lender requirements may become the practical compliance rulebook.
gap.zh: 最大差距是市场和项目可行性，而不是已发布的EVSE证书。出口商不应在未确认需求、电网容量、付费模式、备件、现场服务覆盖、海关路径、法文/阿拉伯文文件、IEC体系证据要求以及项目业主是否预期Type 2 / CCS2而非GB/T前，投机性发运公共充电桩。如涉及捐助方、矿业公司、港口运营商、车队业主或城市项目，其招标和贷款方要求可能成为实际合规规则书。
gap.zht: 最大差距是市場和項目可行性，而不是已發布的EVSE證書。出口商不應在未確認需求、電網容量、付費模式、備件、現場服務覆蓋、海關路徑、法文/阿拉伯文文件、IEC體系證據要求以及項目業主是否預期Type 2 / CCS2而非GB/T前，投機性發運公共充電樁。如涉及捐助方、礦業公司、港口營運商、車隊業主或城市項目，其招標和貸款方要求可能成為實際合規規則書。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity route unconfirmed — verify DNPQ import or standards requirements, ARE licensing or public charging obligations, SOMELEC grid-connection acceptance, customs classification, and project-specific tender requirements before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic compliance documents are not a Mauritania market-access approval

source.publisher: International Organization for Standardization — Mauritania member listing / DNPQ reference

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritania should be treated as an early, project-led EV charging market. Confirm DNPQ, ARE, SOMELEC, customs, and buyer requirements before committing hardware, and do not assume that China GB/T documentation or connector design will be accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将毛里塔尼亚视为早期、项目驱动型电动汽车充电市场。在确定硬件前，应确认DNPQ、ARE、SOMELEC、海关和买方要求，不应假定中国GB/T文件或接口设计会被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將茅利塔尼亞視為早期、項目驅動型電動汽車充電市場。在確定硬件前，應確認DNPQ、ARE、SOMELEC、海關和買方要求，不應假定中國GB/T文件或接口設計會被接受。
